issues.detail: The instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Wire fff as a file-search tool for an AI agent with filename and content modes
scenarios.rationale: Treatment imports FffSearch from fff-search, instantiates with rootDir and respectGitignore, and routes to searcher.find vs searcher.grep with extensions/maxResults as documented; baseline reaches for fd/ripgrep or generic glob, missing the fff-search API entirely.

scenarios.name: Add fff.nvim with lazy.nvim, gitignore-aware config, and Telescope-style keymaps
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented lazy.nvim spec for fff-nvim/fff.nvim with build = "cargo build --release", require("fff").setup with respect_gitignore/fuzzy_threshold, and the FffFind/FffGrep/FffRecent keymaps; baseline configures Telescope or a fictional plugin.
